title: Finite Concentration Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite concentration bad tail-bound QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite replay computes tail probability 1/4 but the malformed concentration row claims the bound tail_probability <= 1/8.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite concentration rows only when they add distinct exact-linear or integer-count solver pressure; keep Chernoff, Hoeffding, LLN, CLT, martingale concentration, and asymptotic inference in the Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite tail events, expectations, variances, and event unions as exact rational tables.
Replay Markov, Chebyshev, and union-bound inequalities by exact rational arithmetic.
Keep the bad finite tail-bound row on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path after replay computes the tail probability.
Keep Chernoff/Hoeffding bounds, laws of large numbers, CLT, martingale inequalities, and asymptotic statistics marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
